title: Entangled Crystals
description: Introduces a mystical way to bind locations to physical gems, allowing for one-time, cross-dimensional teleportation back to your marked destination.
body:
# Entangled Crystals
**Entangled Crystals** adds a two-step teleportation system based on a new item: the **Pearl of Entanglement**.

![Entangled Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6fbf013a25785478faeaf3b04364c87c5168a46.png)

### Location Registration
By holding the **Right-Click** button for several seconds, the player binds their current coordinates and dimension to the Pearl. Once the process is complete, the item transforms into an **Entangled Crystal**.

- **Renaming**: The Pearl (or the resulting Crystal) can be renamed using an anvil. This allows players to easily identify the saved destination.

### Teleportation
Using the Entangled Crystal follows the same interaction:

- **Activation**: Hold Right-Click for several seconds.
- **Effect**: The player is instantly transported to the previously saved coordinates.
- **Safety Feature**: Upon arrival, the player is granted the Slow Falling effect for a short duration to prevent fall damage and ensure a safe landing.
- **Cross-Dimensional**: Teleportation works regardless of the current dimension (e.g., traveling from the Nether to the Overworld).
- **Consumption**: The crystal is consumed upon successful teleportation, making it a single-use item.

### Crafting
The **Pearl of Entanglement** can be crafted in survival mode:

![Pearl of Entanglement Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/060ecf5874547a6780eb7907c5d7eb2f6b6d8f33.png)
